name: Orange Honey Mustard
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Grated rind of large orange
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the flour, sugar, mustard powder, and turmeric. Stir in the water. Let stand for 2 hours.
2. Combine the mustard mixture, honey, and vinegar in the top of a double boiler. Cook, whisking often, over boiling water until the mixture just begins to thicken, about 3 minutes. Continue cooking for 2 more minutes, whisking constantly, until slightly thickened. Stir in the grated orange rind into the cooked mustard mixture (the mixture will thicken completely as it stands). Pour into a clean storage jar. Cover and refrigerate at least overnight or up to 1 month.
